intake.event_framing: Assess Apple strategy after a sudden CEO transition during product delays and margin pressure.
intake.current_development: Apple faces a sudden CEO transition after product delays, investor concern, and supplier anxiety.
known_constraints: Premium brand positioning must be preserved
known_unknowns: Whether the board will favor an internal successor

summary: The board wants stability before the next product cycle

documents.apple-succession.md: Analysts focus on Apple succession clarity, supplier reassurance, and investor concern after product delays.
documents.apple-roadmap.md: Apple product roadmap credibility and premium brand messaging are central to calming customers and suppliers.

intake.event_framing: Assess Boeing strategy after another weak quarter and renewed safety scrutiny.
intake.current_development: Boeing reports another weak quarter while safety scrutiny, delivery concerns, and customer anxiety intensify.
known_unknowns: Whether the company can stabilize production rates quickly

summary: Management needs visible operational credibility quickly

documents.boeing-quarter.md: Boeing faces investor concern, a weak quarter, and cash preservation pressure as delivery concerns mount.
documents.boeing-safety.md: Safety scrutiny and regulatory pressure are forcing Boeing to reassure customers and defend production recovery.

case_title: OpenAI governance crisis and board reset
historical_outcome: OpenAI reversed the abrupt leadership change, restored Sam Altman as CEO, and moved toward a governance reset with a new initial board.

sources.title: Sam Altman returns as CEO, OpenAI has a new initial board

intake.event_framing: Assess OpenAI strategy after the November 2023 board crisis and leadership reversal.
intake.current_development: OpenAI faces abrupt board-driven leadership turnover, governance questions, partner pressure, and a need to reassure employees and customers.
known_constraints: Leadership credibility and partner confidence must be restored quickly
known_unknowns: Whether governance reforms will stabilize stakeholder confidence

summary: The company will prioritize governance stabilization and stakeholder reassurance over radical strategic change

documents.leadership-transition.md: OpenAI announced a leadership transition in November 2023 after the board removed Sam Altman and named an interim CEO.
documents.board-reset.md: OpenAI later returned Sam Altman as CEO, installed a new initial board, and said it would strengthen corporate governance.

case_title: Boeing 737-9 MAX grounding and quality reset
historical_outcome: After the Alaska Airlines Flight 1282 incident, Boeing faced FAA grounding and production restrictions and moved into a broader stakeholder confidence and safety-quality reset under intensified regulatory oversight.

sources.title: FAA Halts Boeing MAX Production Expansion to Improve Quality Control
737-9 Updates: Boeing to Hold Quality Stand Downs

intake.event_framing: Assess Boeing strategy after the January 2024 737-9 MAX incident, grounding, and FAA production restrictions.
intake.current_development: After the Alaska Airlines Flight 1282 incident, the FAA grounded affected 737-9 MAX aircraft, halted Boeing's planned production expansion, and intensified quality oversight.
known_constraints: Safety and production quality must be restored under direct regulatory oversight
Airline customers need operational credibility and delivery certainty
known_unknowns: Whether Boeing can stabilize production quality fast enough to restore stakeholder confidence

summary: Management will prioritize a visible safety and quality reset over aggressive short-term expansion

documents.faa-max9.md: The FAA said it grounded affected 737-9 MAX aircraft, blocked Boeing from expanding MAX production, and increased oversight of Boeing and its suppliers after the January 2024 incident.
documents.boeing-quality-plan.md: Boeing said it would hold quality stand downs and focus production teams on safety and quality improvements after the 737-9 MAX incident.

case_title: CrowdStrike July 2024 outage and customer trust reset
historical_outcome: CrowdStrike moved into transparent remediation, customer restoration, and trust-rebuilding after the July 2024 outage rather than defending the status quo.

sources.title: Falcon Content Update Preliminary Post Incident Report

intake.event_framing: Assess CrowdStrike strategy after the July 2024 Falcon sensor outage disrupted customer systems and forced an immediate trust-repair campaign.
intake.current_development: A faulty Falcon content update crashes Windows systems, forces emergency remediation, and creates customer pressure for transparency and operational reassurance.
known_constraints: Enterprise customers need rapid system restoration and credible prevention steps
The company must preserve brand trust while managing operational recovery
known_unknowns: Whether transparency and remediation will stabilize customer confidence quickly

summary: Management will prioritize customer restoration, transparency, and trust repair over aggressive strategic change

documents.ceo-apology.md: CrowdStrike apologized directly to customers, said it identified the issue and deployed a fix, and pledged transparency and support during restoration.
documents.post-incident-report.md: CrowdStrike published a preliminary post-incident report describing the failed content update, the reversion window, and changes to testing and deployment controls.

case_title: Intel 2024 cost reduction and operating model reset
historical_outcome: Intel responded to its 2024 pressure point with major cost cuts, headcount reduction, and capital discipline rather than defending the prior operating model.

sources.title: Intel Reports Second-Quarter 2024 Financial Results; Announces $10 Billion Cost Reduction Plan to Increase Efficiency and Market Competitiveness

intake.event_framing: Assess Intel strategy after its August 2024 cost-reduction announcement and operating model reset.
intake.current_development: Weak financial performance triggers a 10 billion dollar cost-reduction plan, significant headcount actions, and cuts to capital spending as management resets the operating model.
known_constraints: The company still needs to fund its long-term technology roadmap
Investors and customers need evidence that execution is stabilizing
known_unknowns: Whether the cost reset can improve operating stability without worsening confidence

summary: Management will emphasize operating discipline and execution repair before any broader growth narrative regains traction

documents.intel-results.md: Intel said it was pursuing a 10 billion dollar cost reduction plan to increase efficiency and align spending with market conditions.
documents.intel-operating-model.md: Pat Gelsinger said Intel had to fundamentally change how it operates, reduce headcount, and cut capital expenditures to fit the new operating model.

case_title: Southwest operational meltdown and resiliency reset
historical_outcome: Southwest moved into an operational resiliency and modernization response after the 2022 holiday meltdown rather than treating it as a narrow messaging problem.

sources.title: DOT Penalizes Southwest Airlines $140 Million for 2022 Holiday Meltdown
Southwest Airlines Plans to Boost Operational Resiliency to Enhance Support for Employees and Customers

intake.event_framing: Assess Southwest strategy after the 2022 holiday operational meltdown and subsequent resiliency overhaul.
intake.current_development: The 2022 holiday collapse strands passengers, triggers regulatory scrutiny, and forces Southwest to announce a broader operational resiliency plan.
known_constraints: Operational reliability must improve under public and regulatory scrutiny
Customer trust and scheduling credibility need repair
known_unknowns: Whether the resiliency program can restore stable operations quickly enough to calm customers and regulators

summary: The company will prioritize operational recovery and systems resilience over a narrow communications response

documents.dot-meltdown.md: DOT said Southwest's operational failures during the 2022 holiday period stranded over two million passengers and triggered a record consumer protection penalty.
documents.resiliency-plan.md: Southwest said it would boost operational resiliency through technology, network coordination, and support improvements for employees and customers.
